title: Woman Without a Soul
writer: Alphonse Daudet, Alfonso Lapeña, Fernando de Fuentes
actors: Fernando Soler, María Félix, Andrés Soler
plot: Teresa (Maria Felix) is a beautiful, young, middle-class woman who is determined to climb the social ladder.To that end she employs her beauty and her charms to manipulate rich men while playing with their emotions. This behaviour...
